reviews.comment:
la vieja que atiende en la sucursal del ACA una maleducada, me hizo perder dinero y tiempo, mentirosa. mala onda, no vayan, vayan a la Sede Central ahi si son respetuosas

(Translated by Google)
The old woman who works at the ACA branch is rude; she made me waste money and time. She's a liar. She's awful. Don't go there; go to the main branch, they're respectful there.
